generated_oml:
instance PhysicalCrane : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Lab-scale gantry crane structure and dedicated controller in research laboratory environment"
]

instance CraneStateDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PhysicalCrane
]

instance CraneStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Crane operational state data including position, velocity, and load information"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CraneStateDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]

instance TimescaleDB : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Time-series database for storing crane operational data"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides persistent operational records for historical analysis"
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataInsight
]

instance HistoricalDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Persistent operational records for historical analysis"
]

instance RealTimeDataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive monitoring of crane operations through real-time data visualization"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVisualizationInsight
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Interactive monitoring of crane operations for real-time decision-making"
]

instance Grafana : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Data visualization dashboard tool for real-time monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeDataVisualizationService
]

instance OptimalControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time system optimization through optimal control algorithms"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalControlAction
]

instance OptimalControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjusting crane parameters for optimal performance"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance GantryLib : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python library for control and simulation logic of gantry crane"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalControlService
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Ensuring model fidelity against physical system behavior through continuous validation"
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelFidelityInsight
]

instance ModelFidelityInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Validation of digital twin model accuracy against physical system"
]

instance C4Model : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "C4 Model with context and container diagrams for software architecture visualization"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Capella
]

instance Capella : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "System architecture design tool using Arcadia method"
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousValidationService
]

instance Docker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Containerization platform for system dissemination"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalControlService, HistoricalDataLoggingService, RealTimeDataVisualizationService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance MQTTBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT Broker for message queuing in control system"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalControlService
]

instance Fusion360 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Autodesk Fusion360 for CAD modeling of physical crane structure"
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousValidationService
]

instance Arduino : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Hardware controller interfacing for physical crane control"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalControlService
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The Control Application (Python) uses the Physical Crane Interface to execute control commands on the physical crane, with operator configurations and controls provided through the Human Machine Interface (HMI)."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system employs the C4 Model for architectural visualization with context and container diagrams. Components include InfluxDB for time-series data storage, ActiveMQ as a message broker, and virtualization/containerization technologies for deployment. Microsoft Azure tools are used for cloud-based pipeline implementation in the Air Quality Management exemplar, while the Lab Scale Gantry Crane utilizes C4 Model to structure its cyber-physical system architecture."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Services communicate via MQTT over a local network on a single personal computer. The Database, MQTT Broker, and Dashboard are containerized with Docker, while other components run as native processes. Network topology details, bandwidth/latency requirements, and security protocols are not specified in the document."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The system is deployed on-premise on a personal computer. Database, MQTT Broker, and Dashboard are containerized with Docker, while other components (Physical Crane Interface, Control Application, Logging Application, HMI, Trajectory Generator, Simulation Service, Continuous Validation Service) run as native processes. No cloud, edge, or scalability mechanisms beyond single-host deployment are mentioned in the document."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Integration with external systems via ActiveMQ message broker for data exchange, Microsoft Azure services for cloud infrastructure, and AutomationML standards for model interoperability. GreenhouseDT uses InfluxDB for time-series data storage and virtual machines for deployment, while the Air Quality Management exemplar implements its digital twin pipeline using Azure tools."
]
